message:
feat(node): Add LocalDatabase with CRUD operations and ACID support

- Add LocalDatabase class with manifest-based ACID transactions
- Implement SQL parser for CREATE/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE/SELECT
- Add fragment-based file storage with deletion vectors
- Support CREATE TABLE, DROP TABLE, INSERT INTO, UPDATE, DELETE
- SELECT with WHERE, ORDER BY, LIMIT
- Add vector column support (VECTOR type with dimension)
- Add persistence test for ACID durability
- Export LocalDatabase and FileStorage from main index
